metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2562
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Results section. "Ultrastructural localization of Syt11 in rat hippocampal CA1 synapses by immunoelectron microscopy"

-Literal: "In addition, the small amount of gold particles was also present in postsynapses. This result strongly provides further evidence that Syt11 distributes mainly in axonal nerve terminals as well as rarely in dendritic spines, consistent with colocalization analysis in Fig. 4.". Experimental description: Methods section: "Electron microcopy"

-Literal. "Ultrastructural subcellular localization of Syt11 in rat brains was examined using immuno-EM, as described previously (Paik et al., 2011). CA1 hippocampal sections of rat brains (60 lm; 8 weeks) were incubated for 2 h with goat anti-Syt11 antibodies (1:200) and rabbit anti-goat IgG 10 nm gold-conjugated (EMS, #25228, SUA) ....."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
